questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The simple interest on $5000$ at $8\%$ per annum for $3$ years is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The probability of getting a head in a single toss of a fair coin is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Probability = favourable / total equally likely outcomes.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{2}=0.5$.

**Answer.** $0.5$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Select the word most similar in meaning to 'ABATE'.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** 'Abate' means to become less intense or to reduce.

**Working.** Among the options, 'diminish' is the closest synonym; 'increase' is its antonym.

**Answer.** diminish.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: An amount of $600$ is divided in the ratio $2:3$. The larger part is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Each share equals the total times its ratio fraction.

**Working.** Larger fraction $=\dfrac{3}{2+3}=\dfrac{3}{5}$, so
$$600\times\frac{3}{5}=360$$

**Answer.** $360$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: MINER : ORE :: FARMER : ?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The relationship is 'worker : product extracted/produced'.

**Working.** A miner extracts ore; a farmer produces a crop. A tractor and field are tools/locations, not products.

**Answer.** crop.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Select the synonym of 'METICULOUS'.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** 'Meticulous' describes someone who shows great attention to detail.

**Working.** 'Careful' captures this meaning; the remaining options describe the opposite trait.

**Answer.** careful.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: In the dot series shown ($1, 2, 3, \ldots$ dots), the next figure should contain

figure.caption: Three groups of dots containing one, two and three dots respectively.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='95' cy='30' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='95' cy='50' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='25' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='45' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='165' cy='65' r='6' fill='#6366f1'/><text x='210' y='45' font-size='28' fill='#94a3b8'>?</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** The count increases by one each step.

**Working.** $1, 2, 3, \ldots$ so the next figure has $4$ dots.

**Answer.** 4 dots.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Which of the following numbers is divisible by $9$?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** A number is divisible by $9$ if its digit sum is divisible by $9$.

**Working.** $1+2+3+4+8=18$, which is divisible by $9$.

**Answer.** $12348$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: An article marked $25\%$ above its cost price is sold at a $10\%$ discount. The profit percentage is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Apply markup then discount on a base cost of $100$.

**Working.** CP $=100$, MP $=125$, SP $=125\times0.9=112.5$; profit $=12.5\%$.

**Answer.** $12.5\%$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The bar chart shows annual sales (in units) for four years: $40, 60, 30, 80$. The highest annual sales figure is _____ units.

figure.caption: Bar chart of annual sales for 2018-2021: 40, 60, 30, 80 units.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><line x1='30' y1='160' x2='220' y2='160' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='1'/><rect x='40' y='100' width='28' height='60' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='80' y='70' width='28' height='90' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='120' y='115' width='28' height='45' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='160' y='40' width='28' height='120' fill='#6366f1'/><text x='44' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2018</text><text x='84' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2019</text><text x='124' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2020</text><text x='164' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2021</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Read the tallest bar.

**Working.** The values are $40,60,30,80$; the maximum is $80$ (year 2021).

**Answer.** $80$.

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $4\,\text{m}$ carries a central point load $60\,\text{kN}$. The magnitude of the fixed-end moment is _____ kN·m.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Fixed-end moment for a central point load $=\dfrac{WL}{8}$.

**Working.**
$$M=\dfrac{60\times 4}{8}=30.$$

**Answer.** $30\,\text{kN·m}$
